Welcome to Shiv Vedika Trust

Welcome to Shiv Vedika Trust, a sanctuary dedicated to providing spiritual solace and support for those seeking liberation (mukti) in their final journey. Nestled near the sacred Manikarnika Ghat in Varanasi, we offer a serene environment for individuals to experience peace, reflection, and spiritual fulfilment—all at no cost.

Our Services

Spiritual Support

Personalized spiritual guidance and counseling for those seeking solace.

Rituals & Ceremonies

Conducting traditional Hindu rituals to aid in spiritual transition and bring peace.

Medical Care

Providing essential medical support to ensure comfort in final days.
Know More

Join Us

Be a part of this noble journey through donations, volunteering, or participating in our programs. Your support helps us provide this essential service, ensuring that everyone can experience a peaceful and spiritually fulfilling end-of-life journey.
Know More

Donate Us

Your support is crucial for helping us continue our mission. Every contribution, no matter how small, makes a significant impact. You can donate securely through our PhonePe account registered under ‘Shiv Vedika Trust’. Together, we can ensure that everyone has the opportunity to experience a peaceful and spiritually fulfilling end-of-life journey.
Know More

Rituals and Prayers in the Temple during the Tour

Working Hours

Mon-Fri: 9 AM – 6 PM

Saturday: 9 AM – 4 PM

Sunday: Closed

Office
